_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Apply standards to identify safety risk and protect cyber-physical functions
reference_document_element_description: Conduct AI system risk classification under the EU AI Act, documenting risk category determination, applicable requirements identification, and conformity assessment pathway selection.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Task RC-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.499), SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.498).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.501). Shared vocabulary: [risk]. NICE-only terms [apply, cyber, functions, identify, physical, protect] vs WIDAI-only terms [act, ai, applicable, assessment, category, classification] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.869, R=0.859). Balanced P/R — the 10-word NICE element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Apply standards to identify safety risk and protect cyber-physical functions" and "Conduct AI system risk classification under the EU AI Act, documenting risk cate" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.502 ≈ STS 0.501 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [risk]. NICE-only: [apply, cyber, functions, identify, physical, protect]. WIDAI-only: [act, ai, applicable, assessment, category, classification].
